en_title: The Global Second-Hand Video Game Market Is Valued at $7.2 Billion, but Sony's Decision to Kill PlayStation Discs Threatens to Destroy It, Analysts Say
cn_title: 索尼停产PlayStation光盘或重创72亿美元(约合人民币487亿元)二手市场
subtitle: 实体版走向终局

paragraphs.en: Sony’s decision to end production of PlayStation discs for new games from 2028 threatens to destroy the second-hand market, analysts have said.
paragraphs.cn: 分析师表示，索尼决定从2028年起停止为PlayStation新游戏生产光盘，可能摧毁二手游戏市场。

paragraphs.en: It's a tradition as old as video games themselves. Selling games or trading them in to either make some money back on your purchase or make buying new games cheaper has been a valuable option for gamers for decades. I've sold and traded in countless games over the years, especially when money was tight and I couldn't afford to buy new games at full price.
paragraphs.cn: 这项传统几乎与电子游戏本身一样古老。数十年来，玩家可以出售或折价置换游戏，收回部分购买成本，或降低购买新游戏的支出。多年来我卖掉和置换过无数游戏，尤其是在手头紧、买不起全价新作的时候。

paragraphs.en: Of course, I'm aware of the transition to digital and digital's dominance over the market as it stands today. Indeed, I download most of my games these days (I recently bought a copy of Marvel's Avengers for PS5 from eBay for my son to play because it had been delisted from digital storefronts). But still, I was surprised to see just how big the second-hand video game market remains, and that it's projected to grow.
paragraphs.cn: 我当然知道市场正在转向数字版，而且数字版如今占据主导地位。事实上，我现在大多数游戏也是下载购买的（最近我还在eBay为儿子买了一张PS5版《漫威复仇者联盟》，因为该作已从数字商店下架）。即便如此，二手电子游戏市场仍然如此庞大、且预计还会增长，仍令我感到意外。

paragraphs.en: CNBC reported on estimates from Dataintelo , which valued the global second-hand video game market at $7.2 billion last year, and predicted it would grow to $13.8 billion by 2034. Consoles are 42.3% of the revenue share of last year’s valuation of the second hand market, with North America the biggest portion of that market. As you’d expect, GameStop and CEX led the competitive landscape in 2025.
paragraphs.cn: CNBC援引Dataintelo的估算称，去年全球二手电子游戏市场价值72亿美元(约合人民币487亿元)（原文7.2 billion美元，约合人民币487亿元），预计到2034年将增长至138亿美元(约合人民币934亿元)（原文13.8 billion美元，约合人民币934亿元）。主机游戏占去年二手市场收入的42.3%，北美则是其中最大的市场。正如人们所料，GameStop与CEX在2025年的竞争格局中处于领先地位。

paragraphs.en: Dataintelo said that the second-hand market was fueled by concerns around affordability (I think we can all agree on that one), the growing retro gaming culture, and what it called “digital-to-physical gaming transitions.”
paragraphs.cn: Dataintelo称，二手市场的动力来自玩家对可负担性的关注（这一点大家应该都同意）、不断壮大的复古游戏文化，以及该机构所说的「数字游戏转向实体游戏」。

paragraphs.en: But Sony’s controversial decision to ditch physical discs for PlayStation games threatens to destroy this market. Kazunori Ito, director of equity research at Morningstar, told CNBC that the second-hand market for games will “keep shrinking and eventually disappear.” Michael Pachter, managing director of strategic planning at Wedbush Securities, told CNBC that "brick and mortar game retail is doomed,” when historically, at least one third of games have been sold as used.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，索尼放弃PlayStation游戏实体光盘的争议决定，可能摧毁这个市场。晨星股票研究主管Kazunori Ito告诉CNBC，游戏二手市场将「持续萎缩，最终消失」。Wedbush Securities战略规划董事总经理迈克尔·Pachter则表示，鉴于过去至少三分之一的游戏以二手形式售出，如今「实体游戏零售注定走向末路」。

paragraphs.en: Sony’s rationale for ditching discs is that it’s simply following consumer trends. “In response to shifting trends in consumer preference, new games will be released on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only,” Sid Shuman, Senior Director, Sony Interactive Entertainment Content Communications, said in a post on PlayStation Blog .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼给出的理由是，放弃光盘只是顺应消费者趋势。索尼互动娱乐内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman在PlayStation Blog发文称：「为回应消费者偏好的变化趋势，新游戏将只以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处发行。」

paragraphs.en: “As consumer preferences and the broader entertainment industry continue to shift away from physical discs to digital, physical game disc production for all new games releasing on PlayStation consoles will be discontinued starting January 2028. Following this date, new games will be available on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only. This transition has no impact on games that already released, or will be releasing, prior to January 2028 in disc format.
paragraphs.cn: 「随着消费者偏好及整个娱乐行业继续从实体光盘转向数字形式，自2028年1月起，所有在PlayStation主机推出的新游戏都将停止生产实体光盘。此后，新游戏只会以数字形式在PlayStation Store和零售商处提供。这次转型不会影响已发行、或将在2028年1月前以光盘形式发行的游戏。

paragraphs.en: “This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs. This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games today."
paragraphs.cn: 「数字媒体的整体偏好已大幅超过实体光盘，索尼互动娱乐顺应消费者趋势是自然方向。这次转型能让我们更贴近当今大多数社区成员获取和游玩游戏的方式。」

paragraphs.en: Reinforcing this trend, Mat Piscatella, Senior Director and Video Game Industry Advisor at Circana, said that just seven PlayStation video games had sold more than 100,000 physical units so far this year in the U.S. . Only two PlayStation video games sold more than 10,000 physical units in the U.S. during the week ending July 11.
paragraphs.cn: Circana高级总监兼电子游戏行业顾问Mat Piscatella提供的数据进一步印证了这一趋势：今年迄今，美国仅有7款PlayStation游戏的实体销量超过10万份（100,000份）；截至7月11日的一周内，也只有两款PlayStation游戏在美国卖出超过1万份（10,000份）实体版。

paragraphs.en: However, since the announcement, gamers have called on Sony to U-turn on its decision, signing online petitions and swarming over PlayStation social media posts to express concern about video game preservation and ownership — even overshadowing the release of new games that have nothing to do with what’s going on at Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，自公告发布以来，玩家一直要求索尼收回决定。他们签署网络请愿书，并涌入PlayStation社交媒体帖文表达对电子游戏保存与所有权的担忧，甚至盖过了与索尼这场风波毫无关系的新游戏发布消息。

paragraphs.en: Complaints have also come from other groups. The UK’s Digital Entertainment and Retail Association (ERA) called Sony’s decision “a triumph of corporate convenience over consumer choice.”
paragraphs.cn: 其他团体也提出了批评。英国数字娱乐与零售协会（ERA）称，索尼的决定是「企业便利战胜消费者选择」。

paragraphs.en: In a statement published online , Kim Bayley, CEO of ERA, said its data shows that 25% of under 25s use discs for gaming, and that discs should remain as a choice on top of digital.
paragraphs.cn: ERA首席执行官Kim Bayley在网上发表声明称，该协会数据显示，25岁以下人群中有25%使用光盘玩游戏；除数字版外，光盘也应继续作为一种选择。

paragraphs.en: “Every year, millions of gamers still choose to buy physical copies because they value true ownership. A disc can be shared with family, traded in, collected, preserved and, crucially, still played years from now. A download licence often offers none of those freedoms,” Bayley said.
paragraphs.cn: Bayley表示：「每年仍有数百万玩家选择购买实体版，因为他们重视真正的所有权。光盘可以与家人分享、折价置换、收藏和保存，更重要的是，多年后依然可以游玩。下载许可往往不提供这些自由。」

paragraphs.en: It remains unlikely that Sony will U-turn on this, analysts have told IGN . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 多名分析师告诉IGN，索尼仍不太可能收回决定。日本游戏行业咨询公司Kantan Games首席执行官Serkan Toto博士指出，即使有50万人以取消PlayStation Plus订阅表示抗议，对索尼而言也只是沧海一粟。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 随着主机成本上涨、销量预计大幅下滑，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚到更多。以《最后生还者》这样的PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能留下约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于生产。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能只有约为15%。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 数字下载的利润率则高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自有的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入；对于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%，也就是一款70美元(约合人民币475元)的游戏能为其带来约21美元(约合人民币143元)的收入。

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere游戏行业分析师Piers Harding-Rolls表示，过去两代主机期间发生了巨大变化。他在Ampere网站发文称：「主机游戏是游戏行业中实体媒体最后的阵地，但实体产品的重要性一直在下降。2013年PS4推出时，Ampere数据显示，索尼主机完整游戏总销量中只有13%来自数字版（包括仅提供数字版的游戏）。到了2025年，数字版在完整游戏购买量中的占比已接近80%。」

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 「这项公告的多个方面难免会引发PlayStation玩家担忧，包括选择权、在新主机上使用旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏的能力，以及游戏保存；但玩家的购买趋势已经非常明确。」

paragraphs.en: One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，实体媒体粉丝曾经有机会却错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu告诉《金融时报》：「如果玩家和保存主义者当初购买更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以证明这一决定合理的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, government authorities seem unlikely to be able to do much to prevent Sony going through with its decision. Over the weekend the EU said it was powerless to stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，政府机构似乎也不太可能采取有效措施阻止索尼执行这一决定。上周末，欧盟表示无力阻止索尼——事实上也无力阻止任何公司——取消光盘。

summary: 索尼将从2028年起停止为PlayStation新游戏生产光盘。分析师认为，此举可能让去年估值72亿美元、预计到2034年增至138亿美元的全球二手游戏市场不断萎缩并最终消失。
opus_summary: 全球二手游戏市场去年估值72亿美元(约合人民币487亿元)，但索尼决定从2028年起停止为新作生产PlayStation光盘。行业人士认为数字版的高利润令索尼几乎不可能回头，实体游戏零售与收藏生态将受重创。

translated_terms.ERA: 英国数字娱乐与零售协会
